title: The Rhythm Beneath
description: Something strange is happening beneath the normal rhythm of student life. Not all magical incidents this term have obvious explanations.

title: Magical Incidents — Connected?
description: Several unrelated magical incidents have occurred this term. Coincidence? Or is there a pattern connecting them?

title: Creature Behavior Changes
description: Campus animals and magical creatures have been behaving strangely near certain parts of campus. Keep track of where and when.

title: Strange Patterns in the Dark
description: Odd magical residue has been observed in places that shouldn't have it. It seems to follow a pattern — but what pattern?
